title: A memorable trip
prompt: Talk about a place you visited and what you liked there.
reference_text: Last summer I visited Lisbon and I loved the food and the friendly people.

title: Travel problem
prompt: Describe a small problem you had while travelling and how you solved it.
reference_text: My train was delayed, so I called my hotel and changed my check-in time.

title: Next destination
prompt: Explain where you would like to travel next and why.
reference_text: I would like to visit Japan because I am interested in the culture and the food.
